expectedAnswers: We're 85% on track. UX was delayed but dev caught up—no impact on launch.
Overall, we're ahead on backend and have hit every sprint goal. The UX delay was minor and already resolved.
On track with minor adjustments—everything’s under control and we’re confident about the deadline.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明当前进度与关键问题
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了项目汇报关键词如 on track, delay, mitigated, caught up
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个进度相关关键词（如 on track, caught up, resolved）

content.speakerText: What’s the status of the new feature rollout?
content.speakerTextCn: 新功能上线的进展如何？
expectedAnswers: We've completed 90% of development and started user testing. No major bugs found so far.
The rollout is on schedule—we finished coding ahead of time and QA is running smoothly.
All core features are live in staging. We're waiting for final sign-off from product team.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明当前阶段（开发/测试/上线）
语言准确性：使用了正确动词如 completed, started, finished, running
表达自然度：语气自信、专业，避免模糊表达如 'I think' 或 'maybe'
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个项目关键词（如 on schedule, completed, QA, staging）

content.speakerText: Any risks or blockers we should know about?
content.speakerTextCn: 有什么潜在风险或障碍需要我们注意吗？
expectedAnswers: No major blockers—just a small delay in third-party API integration, but we have a workaround in place.
We're monitoring a potential resource constraint next week, but we've already scheduled backup staff.
All clear so far. We're ahead on timeline and have contingency plans ready for any delays.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动识别并说明风险及应对方案
语言准确性：使用了专业表达如 blockers, workaround, contingency plan, monitoring
表达自然度：语气积极，强调解决方案而非问题本身
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个风险应对关键词（如 workaround, contingency plan, monitoring）
